# Database

## Storage Model

Emberglow uses **local YAML file storage** for recipes (`.ember` files). No external database is required.

### Recipe Storage

- **Format**: YAML files with `.ember` extension
- **Location**: User-supplied file paths
- **Parsing**: `gopkg.in/yaml.v3`

## Entity Relationships

```
Recipe (1) ──────< Device (N)
    │
    └──────< Rule (N)
                │
                ├────< Trigger (1)
                │         │
                │         └────< Unless (0..1)
                │
                └────< Action (N)
```

## Entity Schemas

### Recipe

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| Name | string | Recipe identifier |
| Devices | []Device | Connected devices |
| Rules | []Rule | Automation rules |

### Device

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| Name | string | Device instance name |
| Type | string | Driver type (e.g., hue_bulb) |
| Params | map[string]string | Driver-specific parameters |
| Options | map[string]string | Runtime options |

### Rule

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| Name | string | Rule identifier |
| When | Trigger | Primary trigger condition |
| Then | []Action | Actions to execute |
| Unless | *Trigger | Cancel condition [?] |

### Trigger

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| Device | string | Source device name |
| Event | string | Event name |
| Params | map[string]string | Event parameters |

### Action

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| Device | string | Target device name |
| Do | string | Action command |
| Params | map[string]string | Action parameters |
| Delay | string | Delay before execution [?] |

## Notes

- `Params` and `Options` map values are all strings
- Numeric params (`level`, `kelvin`) require runtime coercion by device drivers
- No persistence layer beyond recipe file reads
